decisions.title: Conditional team-invite based on email domain
decisions.rationale: preserves team-formation signal for corporate signups while cutting bounce for solo users
decisions.source_quote: let's go with conditional team-invite based on email domain

decisions.title: Move logo upload to post-onboarding
decisions.rationale: current in-flow placement is mostly ignored

action_items.title: Pull signup-domain split for last 90 days
action_items.source_quote: pull the exact signup-domain split for the last 90 days by Thursday

action_items.title: Spec conditional-flow state machine and update Figma

summary.tldr: Onboarding redesign will gate the team-invite step on corporate vs personal email domain, keeping activation signal while reducing solo-user bounce. Logo upload moves out of the flow to post-onboarding. Tomás gathers signup-domain data by Thursday; Yuki specs the state machine for next Monday.
